formulas.name: formula
formulas.expression: IF(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T02002"), "DBP", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T02003"), "ECO", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T02004"), "ES", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T02006"), "DIGS", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T02007"), "PEP", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T02008"), "POP", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T03002"), "MOB", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T03003"), "J&OS", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T03006"), "MDS", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T04002"), "DS", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T04004"), "CM", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T19003"), "D&A", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T05002"), "TEC", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T05003"), "SEC", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T05004"), "DEV", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T07001"), "TAL", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T08001"), "SAL", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T04006"), "CS", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T03004"), "INT", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T03005"), "PRO", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T14002"), "API", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T04005"), "SAP", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T16002"), "XTR", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T16003"), "ARQC", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T16004"), "DE", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00E00000"), "EC", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00E00006"), "SC", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00E10000"), "EE", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00I00004"), "BV", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T04007"), "BIGD", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T18002"), "BC", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "NT00T02001"), "ST", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "NT00T02002"), "GR", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "NT00T02003"), "IN", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "NT00T03001"), "UX", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "NT00T03002"), "UI", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "NT00T03003"), "RE", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "NT00T06001"), "BR", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "NT00T06002"), "ME", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "NT00T04001"), "MA", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "NT00T04002"), "SEO", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "NT00T04005"), "AN", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "NT00T04003"), "PM", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "NT00T04004"), "DS", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "NT00T05001"), "FR", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "NT00T05002"), "BA", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "NT00T05003"), "DO", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T04008"), "IA", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T19002"), "PD", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T19003"), "I&A", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T17003"), "E&E", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T17004"), "IND", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "NT00T04006"), "PE", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "NT00T04007"), "TE", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "NT00T09001"), "DA", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "NT00T06001"), "BR", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "NT00T06002"), "SM", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T03009"), "FE", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "ES00T19004"), "DF", NULL) + if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "TS00T04001"), "S4", NULL)+ if(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Area__c}, "NT00T10001"), "SES", NULL)

formulas.name: NamePS
formulas.expression: LEFT( TRIM( IF( AND({!$Record.EsIntercompany__c} = TRUE, ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1110')), "NA-V-", IF( OR(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1120'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1110')), "NA-", IF( AND({!$Record.EsIntercompany__c} = TRUE, ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1210')), "SB-V", IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1210'), "SB-", IF( AND({!$Record.EsIntercompany__c} = TRUE, ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1410')), "T4S-V", IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1410'), "T4S-", IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '4110'), "CH-", "ES-" ) ) ) ) ) ) ) + IF( ISNULL({!$Record.Oportunidad__r.Account.Name}), "--", LEFT(TRIM({!$Record.Oportunidad__r.Account.Name}), 11) ) + "-" +'PS-'+ {!formula} + "-" + RIGHT({!$Record.Oportunidad__r.Codigo_de_oportunidad__c}, 4) + "-" + LEFT({!$Record.Oportunidad__r.Name}, 11) ), 40 )

formulas.name: NombreSAP
formulas.expression: LEFT( TRIM( IF( AND({!$Record.EsIntercompany__c} = TRUE, ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1110')), "NA-V-", IF( OR(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1120'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1110')), "NA-", IF( AND({!$Record.EsIntercompany__c} = TRUE, ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1210')), "SB-V", IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1210'), "SB-", IF( AND({!$Record.EsIntercompany__c} = TRUE, ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1410')), "T4S-V", IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '1410'), "T4S-", IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Sede__c}, '4110'), "CH-", "ES-" ) ) ) ) ) ) ) + IF( ISNULL({!$Record.Oportunidad__r.Account.Name}), "--", LEFT(TRIM({!$Record.Oportunidad__r.Account.Name}), 11) ) + "-" + {!formula} + "-" + RIGHT({!$Record.Oportunidad__r.Codigo_de_oportunidad__c}, 4) + "-" + LEFT({!$Record.Oportunidad__r.Name}, 11) ), 40 )
